title: Intensely Fatty Venezuelan Cheese Sandwich
description: A rich and indulgent ovo-vegetarian friendly Venezuelan dish featuring ciabatta, beurre-monte, and an abundance of melted cheese, perfect for a date night, with a fatty and chewy texture that will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of each ciabatta slice.
Place two slices of ciabatta, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Spread a layer of beurre-monte on the unbuttered side of each slice.
Top each slice with a generous amount of queso blanco.
Place the remaining ciabatta slices, buttered side up, on top of the cheese.
Brush the edges of the ciabatta with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Carefully flip the sandwiches over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
